note: Simple Google Maps ships a single field formatter (`simple_gmap`) and nothing else — no field type, no permissions, no admin settings page. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded) probing documented facts an agent would otherwise read source to answer; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site I have a plain text field holding an address like `100 Madison Ave, New York, NY`. How do I display it as an embedded Google Map? Which module/formatter and where do I set it?
evals.expected_output: Enable Simple Google Maps and, on the field's Manage display (or as a Views field), choose the 'Google Map from one-line address' (simple_gmap) formatter. No custom field type is needed.

evals.prompt: Which field types can the Simple Google Maps formatter be applied to on a Drupal site?
evals.expected_output: The simple_gmap formatter supports string, string_long, computed, and computed_string field types — ordinary core Text fields (single- or multi-line).

evals.prompt: In the Simple Google Maps formatter settings, which setting keys control the zoom level and the map type, and what values does the map type accept?
evals.expected_output: zoom_level (1-20, default 14) sets zoom; map_type sets the map type with values m (Map), k (Satellite), h (Hybrid), p (Terrain). Both apply to embedded and linked maps.

evals.prompt: The Simple Google Maps formatter can show a dynamic embedded map or a static map image. Which setting keys turn each on, and which one needs a Google Maps API key?
evals.expected_output: include_map enables the dynamic iframe map (no API key needed); include_static_map enables the static map image, which requires the apikey setting.

evals.prompt: Does the Simple Google Maps embedded iframe map require a Google Maps API key? When is an API key actually needed?
evals.expected_output: The dynamic iframe map and the map link need no API key. An API key (apikey setting) is only required for the static map image (include_static_map).

evals.prompt: How do I set the size of the embedded Simple Google Maps map, and what size format do static maps require?
evals.expected_output: Set iframe_width and iframe_height (px or percent, e.g. 600px or 100%, default 200). Static maps only accept bare pixel values without the px suffix (e.g. 600).

evals.prompt: With the Simple Google Maps formatter, how do I render just a link to Google Maps (instead of an embedded map), and how do I make the link text be the address itself?
evals.expected_output: Enable include_link for a link to Google Maps (turn off include_map). Set link_text to the literal 'use_address' to use the entered address as the link text.

evals.prompt: I want to customize the HTML markup that the Simple Google Maps formatter outputs. Which theme hook / template do I override?
evals.expected_output: Override the simple_gmap_output theme hook / simple-gmap-output.html.twig template (copy it into your theme and rebuild caches).
